title: Service air conditioning and HVAC systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service air conditioning and HVAC systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to service system

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information, including manufacturer specifications and Australian automotive code of practice1.3 Identify servicing option required for the job1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for inspect and servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information, including manufacturer specifications and Australian automotive code of practice1.3 Identify servicing option required for the job1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for inspect and servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information, including manufacturer specifications and Australian automotive code of practice1.3 Identify servicing option required for the job1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for inspect and servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to service system

elements.title: Test operation of system and components

pcs.text: Visually check system and report extent of damage according to workplace procedures2.2 Carry out system performance tests according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.3 Report findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Visually check system and report extent of damage according to workplace procedures2.2 Carry out system performance tests according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.3 Report findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Visually check system and report extent of damage according to workplace procedures2.2 Carry out system performance tests according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.3 Report findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Test operation of system and components

elements.title: Service system and components

pcs.text: Read and interpret Australian automotive code of practice regulations3.2 Service system and components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and Australian automotive code of practice3.3 Carry out post-service performance tests according to workplace procedures 3.4 Confirm and report service issue has been resolved according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read and interpret Australian automotive code of practice regulations3.2 Service system and components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and Australian automotive code of practice3.3 Carry out post-service performance tests according to workplace procedures 3.4 Confirm and report service issue has been resolved according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read and interpret Australian automotive code of practice regulations3.2 Service system and components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and Australian automotive code of practice3.3 Carry out post-service performance tests according to workplace procedures 3.4 Confirm and report service issue has been resolved according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Service system and components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete Australian Refrigeration Council accredited (ARCtick) service decal sticker and workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete Australian Refrigeration Council accredited (ARCtick) service decal sticker and workplace documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete Australian Refrigeration Council accredited (ARCtick) service decal sticker and workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
